name: workbuddy-traffic-light
description: A floating traffic light that shows WorkBuddy working, approval, and completion states.

interface.shortDescription: See working, approval, and completion states
interface.longDescription: Shows a small always-on-top traffic light for WorkBuddy. Yellow means WorkBuddy is working, flashing yellow means approval is required, green means the run is complete, and red means no readable session is available.
